title: Ubiquiti UniFi Switch USW-Flex-Mini-3, 3-pack
description: USW-Flex-Mini is a tiny 5-port Gigabit switch managed by UniFi Controller from Ubiquiti in a desktop version with the first port supporting PoE In Its biggest advantage is the Gigabit POE IN on port #1 for easy network expansion even in places where it is not possible to build an electrical outlet. The switch can be powered via active PoE (802.3af/at) and passively using a 44 - 57V adapter. Switch can be also powered via a 5V / 1A USB-C adapter The crucial difference between UniFi and EdgeSwitches is in management - WebGUI management switches is only in EdgeSwitch models. UniFiSwitch is controlled only by UniFi controller (3) Device
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (5) 10/100/1000Mbps Power Power over Ethernet 802.3af, 802.3at Power type PoE, USB-C PoE type PoE-In (only) Max. power consumption [W] 2,5 Power via connector/terminal 5V / 1A Physical characteristics Design Desktop Fans No Chassis design Plastic Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 5 up to 45 Width [mm] 107 Height [mm] 21 Depth [mm] 70 General Switchning capacity [Gbps] 10 Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9000
